constraints: Download data only from the official UCI source, then inspect fields and compute SHA-256 before use.
Keep raw data and checkpoints in ignored local storage; never commit or upload them.
Publish only reviewed minimal code, configuration, dependency locks, split rules, aggregate metrics, and hashes.
Make no novelty, SOTA, leaderboard, universal-science, GPU-performance, or cross-agent native-compatibility claim.
Do not begin GPU training before a separate Gate 2 approval.
rationale: Approved the recommended UCI Covertype wilderness-area split-sensitivity walkthrough and the safe public reproducibility extension.

constraints: Authorize only two fixed-seed Pilot runs; do not authorize the Full block or any public scientific conclusion.
Use the frozen Area 3 class-count-matched split, 50-128-64-7 MLP, seed 101, batch 4096, five epochs, no early stopping, no test evaluation, and no automatic retry.
Stop at 15 GPU-minutes, 30 wall-minutes, currency cost above zero, deterministic-algorithm failure, CUDA/device mismatch, OOM, NaN, integrity failure, privacy finding, or contract drift.

Use the existing local Python, NumPy, and PyTorch environment only; do not install packages, expand network scope, or disclose environment variables, account data, personal paths, host identifiers, device UUIDs, or process lists.
Builder must freeze code, configuration, split manifest, and hashes; an independent Verifier must approve them before training and verify outputs before Gate 3.
Treat Area 4 only as a class-coverage failure and do not train or compare it.
rationale: Approved the exact Area 3 matched-random versus area-holdout Pilot only because the existing local compute and storage preflight met the recorded contract.

constraints: Run only Areas 1 through 3 with two conditions and three frozen seeds.
Keep cumulative GPU time below two hours and do not publish conclusions before Gate 4.
rationale: Approved the bounded eighteen-run Full block after the Pilot completed within the resource envelope.

constraints: Publish only the supported and qualified wording with its caveats.
Do not claim novelty, SOTA, universality, or cross-dataset generalization.
rationale: Approved publication of the qualified claim-to-artifact package after reviewing the bounded Full results.
